# Extracao: Module 3

- **Fonte:** Module 3.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

﻿MODULE 3 THE PRE-PRELAUNCH 

This is an important step that will help you lay the groundwork for your launch. Combined with the Prelaunch, this step is the bread and butter of Product Launch Formula. By the end of this module, you’ll know how to identify what your market wants, craft and refine your offer, and build serious buzz leading into a launch.

1 Introduction to Module 3: Pre-Prelaunch [2 minutes]
This video is a quick introduction to the Pre-Prelaunch and how it fits into the launch sequence. 

2 Pre-Prelaunch Strategy [6 minutes]
In this lesson, you'll get a more detailed overview of the Pre-Prelaunch, including the key strategies and why they work so well.

3 The Pre-Prelaunch Sequence [4 minutes]
The Pre-Prelaunch sequence helps you identify and refine your offer, and build buzz for that offer. This lesson gives you an overview of the Pre-Prelaunch sequence and how and where this sequence fits into your launch.

4 Identify & Test Your Offer [15 minutes]
How much easier would business be if you could get your prospects to tell you what they WANT you to make for them? In this lesson, you'll learn how to get that information from your prospects, as well as how to figure out if your offer is likely to sell before you start the full launch.

5 The Shot Across the Bow [24 minutes]
This lesson is about the Shot Across the Bow. This is an essential part of the Pre-Prelaunch, which lets your prospects know that something is coming. There are three parts to the Shot Across the Bow: the Email, the Survey, and the Testimonial Cruncher.

6 Refining Your Offer [9 minutes]
A critical aspect of the Pre-Prelaunch is using the information you've gathered (during the Pre-Prelaunch) to refine your offer. In this lesson you'll learn how to refine your offer so that you're only selling what the market wants.

7 Characteristics of Buzz [11 minutes]
Building buzz is an important element of the Pre-Prelaunch and will help to build momentum as you head into your launch. In this lesson, you'll learn the basics of buzz and how to effectively build buzz leading into your launch.

8 Pre-Prelaunch Case Studies [7+15+4 minutes]
In these case studies you'll see real-life examples of how to implement the Pre-Prelaunch, including JV Buzz, the JeffWalker.com blog, and a Shot across the bow example.

9 Pre-Prelaunch Planner [no video]
The Pre-Prelaunch Planner PDF is a step-by-step summary of this module to help you get started quickly. It includes a checklist to help keep you on track.
